title: Revenue waterfall
excerpt: View and analyze monthly revenue with the waterfall report. The [waterfall report](https://dashboard.stripe.com/revenue-recognition/accounting-reports) displays information about your monthly revenue. You can select a range to view, and you can specify a month to show recognized revenue up to. For example, the following waterfall shows revenue billed in April 2025, with monthly recognized revenue up to the end of June 2025: | **Booked** | **Recognized** | **As of Jun 2025** | | **Month** | **Total** | **May 2025** | **Jun 2025** | **Recognized** | **Remaining** | | Apr 2025 | 2,000,000 USD | 400,000 USD | 700,000 USD | 1,100,000 USD | 900,000 USD |
